channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why middle age is becoming a breaking point in the U.S.
item.description: A new international study finds middle-aged Americans are lonelier, more depressed, and experiencing worse memory and health than earlier generations.

item.title: Yellowstone wolves may not have reshaped the national park after all
item.description: One of the most celebrated claims about Yellowstone's wolves faces a major challenge, as scientists question the famous trophic cascade study.

item.title: Parrots may use names, scientists discover
item.description: Analysis of hundreds of recordings suggests parrots use specific sounds as names, not just mimicry.

item.title: Dying star could birth a new universe, study suggests
item.description: A new theory proposes that collapsing stars might create a new universe instead of a black hole.
